<!-- Chart CH-TIM-13 STEP, role-based (themeable) -->

## STEP chart (CH-TIM-13)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-TIM-13",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "change-over-time",
    "trend"
  ],
  "form": "step line (values hold between changes)",
  "data_required": "ordered periods + series whose value HOLDS until it changes (rates, stock, policy)",
  "family": "TIM",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-TIM-01 (continuous change)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "values change continuously",
      "use": "CH-TIM-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- levels that hold between discrete changes: stock, rates, headcount, policies
- the timing of the change is the message

Do NOT use when:
- continuously varying measures (use CH-TIM-01)
- cumulative progress (CH-TIM-02)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title with a number",
  "eyebrow": "caps, DL chrome only",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on top tick",
  "x": "ordered periods",
  "series": "one key + optional context, values hold between points",
  "annotation": "optional, anchored at a data point"
}
```

```json
  "canvas": {

    },

      "size": 13,
      "offset": 10
    },
    "stroke": {
      "key": 2.5,
      "context": 2
    },
    "annotation": {
      "size": 12,
      "style": "italic"
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "step": true,
    "y_zero": true,
    "target_ticks": 5,
    "nice_steps": [
      1,
      2,
      5,
      10
    ]
  }
}
```

### Rules
- horizontal-then-vertical interpolation; the renderer draws the hold explicitly
- y starts at zero
- series labeled at line ends, never a legend
- annotation marks the change that matters

### Never do this
- smooth or diagonal interpolation of held values (invents data)
- markers on every step
- legends

### QA before delivering
- [ ] step interpolation verified
- [ ] y at zero
- [ ] no legend
- [ ] title states the level change with a number
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| key | primary |
| context | benchmark -> muted |
| gridline | gridline |
| zero_line | hairline |
| tick_label | body |
| x_label | body |
| key_label | primary |
| context_label | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |
| annotation | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
